description: Load the recording 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' from ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/ in Playback mode to identify the Alpha rhythm (8-12Hz) in the baseline recording. Start the data stream and configure the FFT Plot widget to show a maximum frequency of 40 Hz. Save a screenshot of the stabilized analysis to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/alpha_analysis.png.
